diagnosis_summary.title_zh: 南港LaLaport：跨領域感官映射與動態演算法模擬
diagnosis_summary.title_en: Nankang LaLaport: Cross-modal Mapping and Dynamic Algorithm Simulation
diagnosis_summary.core_diagnosis: 剝離商業標籤後，該空間的 Vs 向量呈現『高視覺侵略、低感官物質』特徵。透過自然光模擬證明，激活 G 因子（陰影對比）是提升時間感（Ve）的唯一低成本路徑。

mechanism_1.name_zh: 跨領域質感映射：廉價藍牙音響效應
mechanism_1.name_en: Cross-modal Analogy: Cheap Bluetooth Speaker Effect
mechanism_1.description_zh: Vg=4.0（幾何結構）試圖大聲呼喊，但 Vt=2.5（材質）與 Vl=2.0（光影）的低劣表現，類比於具有誇張外殼但音質單薄、LED燈光生硬的工業產品。
mechanism_1.logic: High Visual Signal (Vg) / Low Sensory Substance (Vt, Vl, Vr)

mechanism_2.name_zh: 人工中性光的感官麻醉
mechanism_2.name_en: Sensory Anesthesia of Artificial Neutral Lighting
mechanism_2.description_zh: 由於採用 artificial_neutral 光源，完全消滅了幾何體（geometric_organic）應有的陰影邊緣，導致 Ve（時間感）被鎖定在最低點。

intervention_priority.simulation_scenario: Natural Light Only / Artificial Light Shutdown
intervention_priority.intervention_logic: 自然光引入動態陰影（G因子），將原本靜態平庸的白色幾何體轉化為『時間的日晷』，強制大腦感知外部環境的時間流動。

advanced_query_parameters.counterpoint_search_syntax: SEARCH spaces WHERE Vg IN [3.5, 4.5] AND Vl > 7.0 AND Vr > 7.0 AND Vt >= 6.0

ideal_node_mapping.name: Zen Meditation Garden
ideal_node_mapping.reason: High Vt and Vr suppressing visual noise

ai_summary_en.title: Cross-modal Analysis: The Architecture of Superficial Drama
ai_summary_en.abstract: By stripping the 'shopping mall' label, the vs_vector reveals an entity that shouts visually (Vg:4.0) but whispers tactilely and atmospherically. It mirrors a mass-produced electronic gadget—high styling with low-fidelity internal components.
ai_summary_en.simulation_insight: Shutting down artificial lights to rely on natural illumination would activate the dormant G-Factor, projecting the space from a static 'Non-place' into a temporal vessel, potentially raising Ve from 2.5 to 4.0.
ai_summary_en.recommendation: Use the provided counterpoint query to retrieve spaces that exhibit 'Substantial Geometry' (high Vl/Vr) to understand what this site lacks.
